title: Ctenopteris kalbreyeri
intro: Ctenopteris kalbreyeri, also known as C. kalbreyeri, is a plant species belonging to the family Polypodiaceae, commonly referred to as the polypody ferns. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which may aid in the treatment of various ailments such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of C. kalbreyeri include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbalism, C. kalbreyeri is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to support wound healing, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system.
